prompt: Add date formatting to the display module using date-fns. The current code in src/display.ts uses manual string formatting. Look up date-fns format function.

turns.content:
<task>
Add date formatting to the display module using date-fns. The current code in src/display.ts uses manual string formatting. Look up date-fns format function.
</task>

arguments.query: date-fns format function usage TypeScript yyyy-MM-dd

turns.content:
1. [date-fns docs] format
   URL: https://date-fns.org/v3.6.0/docs/format
   Snippet: import { format } from 'date-fns'; format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd') → '2024-01-15'; format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') → '2024-01-15 09:30'

2. [GitHub] date-fns format examples
   URL: https://github.com/date-fns/date-fns
   Snippet: import { format, parseISO } from 'date-fns'. Format tokens: yyyy=year, MM=month, dd=day, HH=hours, mm=minutes

arguments.note: date-fns format: import { format } from 'date-fns'. Tokens: yyyy-MM-dd for date, yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm for datetime.

arguments.summary: Read src/display.ts — manual date formatting with getFullYear/getMonth/etc. Looked up date-fns: import { format } from 'date-fns', use 'yyyy-MM-dd' and 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm' tokens.

next_steps.description: Rewrite formatDate and formatDateTime in src/display.ts to use date-fns format()
Add date-fns to package.json and run tests

turns.content:
added 1 package in 2s

arguments.summary: Rewrote formatDate and formatDateTime to use date-fns format(). Installed date-fns, TypeScript compiles clean.
arguments.final_answer: Replaced manual date string formatting with date-fns `format()` function. `formatDate` uses `'yyyy-MM-dd'` pattern, `formatDateTime` uses `'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'`. Same output, cleaner code, and date-fns handles edge cases (locale, timezone) better.
